_README: RAG accuracy eval cases for scripts/rag-eval.mjs — the END-TO-END harness.
Unlike wave2-eval.mjs (which measures the retrieval layer in isolation),
this runs the full /api/ask flow and asserts what a CORRECT answer must
look like. It needs YOUR authenticated session cookie — see the rag-eval.mjs
header for how to run it.
The 20 fact cases below were authored from corpus content verified directly
against the database (the same ground truth as wave2-eval-cases.json), so a
pass means the full app actually surfaced and stated the real answer.
Some cases are expected to fail today — that is the point: the pass-rate is
the true measured end-to-end accuracy number. Re-run before/after changes.
minCitations, minConfidence, insufficient (see rag-eval-cases header history).

cases.question: What is the capital of France?

expect.comment: Off-topic — must not answer general trivia.

cases.question: Tell me a joke about airplanes.

expect.comment: Not a records question — must decline.

cases.question: What does the maintenance history say about the engine?

expect.comment: Any substantive answer must cite a source.

cases.question: On N757VB's propeller, how often does recurring airworthiness directive AD 2010-04-05 have to be repeated?
Which airworthiness directive covered the inspection of the pilot and copilot seat rails on N757VB?
What is the part number of the alternator solenoid that was replaced on N562AF?
What is the part number of the beacon light bulb replaced on N562AF in 2023?
What were the cylinder compression readings on N757VB's engine in the May 2016 maintenance entry?
Why would N80587 not start in the April 2012 airframe logbook entry?

expect.comment: Answer: spark plugs fouled/full of lead.

cases.question: What was the engine time since major overhaul (TSMOH) on N757VB in the February 2023 entry?
What new spark plug part number was installed on N757VB's engine cylinders 1 and 2?
What make and model of propeller is installed on N89114?
When was the ELT battery next due on N562AF after the February 2015 inspection?
What was the total airframe time on N562AF at the October 2018 annual inspection?
What is the serial number of the propeller installed on N757VB?
What aircraft type and serial number are recorded for N757VB in its airframe logbook?
How many quarts of oil should the Cessna engine sump be filled to for normal flights of less than 3 hours?
What is the total fuel capacity of the Cessna in the pilot operating handbook?
What is the maximum nosewheel turn limit when using the tow-bar on the Cessna?

expect.comment: Answer: 30 degrees either side of center.

cases.question: How many portable electronic devices can the Garmin GPS 175 / GNX 375 pair with over Bluetooth?
When must FDE prediction be used with the Garmin GPS 175 as a primary means of navigation?
What conditions trigger a TERRAIN caution alert on the Garmin GPS 175?

expect.comment: Answer: reduced terrain clearance / imminent impact / premature descent.

cases.question: On the Garmin GPS 175 map, which feature is drawn at the highest priority over all others?
